description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a series of evenly spaced, parallel grooves running across its top surface, creating a ribbed texture. The grooves are deep and uniform, giving the block a distinctive striped appearance when viewed from above. The sides of the block are smooth and solid, with a matte, slightly speckled stone finish. The coloration is predominantly dark gray to black, with subtle variations in tone that suggest a natural stone material such as granite or basalt. The block is thick and robust, likely intended to serve as a heavy-duty barrier or obstacle in an urban environment. There are no visible markings, engravings, or signs of significant weathering on the surfaces.
description: A thick, dark stone block with deep, parallel grooves across its top surface, giving it a ribbed, striped appearance. The sides are smooth and solid, with a matte stone finish.
description_view_0: The block is seen from the front, showing the full width and the parallel grooves running horizontally across the top surface.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the depth of the grooves and the solid, smooth side face of the block.
description_view_2: The rear view mirrors the front, with the same horizontal grooves visible across the top surface.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again emphasizes the deep grooves and the block's solid, smooth side.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a prepared foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: no visible weathering; surfaces appear clean and well-maintained
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
